repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure/v1: shared-edge compatibility makes cellwise bounds nonsharp for network ADE bounds

published_prior_art.cite: SchroderOprescuFeuerriegelKallus2026 gives sharp fixed canonical exposure-misspecification bounds; BeresteanuMolchanovMolinari2011 gives generic Aumann random-set support machinery
HuLiWager2022 decomposes specified-exposure direct/indirect effects; no latent sparse K-support joint nonrectangularity result found

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure/v1: capacitated-incidence certificate characterization for hidden-edge exposure endpoints

published_prior_art.cite: EdmondsMatchingPolytope1965 and Wolsey1975 supply optimization certificate machinery, not the causal endpoint certificate

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure/v1: finite certificate family for graph-completion exposure endpoint gaps

published_prior_art.cite: BeresteanuMolchanovMolinari2011 plus EdmondsMatchingPolytope1965/Wolsey1975 cover component machinery but not the combined sparse K-label endpoint certificate

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 3 | Conjecture 4
novelty_flags.one_line: The Wolsey1975 comparison overstates the paper as supplying lifted-cover certificates for 0-1 feasibility; verified prior art supports lifted cover/cutting-plane machinery, not a complete infeasibility certificate family.

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup | Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The cellwise relaxation is called a fractional finite polytope, but the displayed constraints contain products such as Z_{iαk}Y_i(α_i,k), r_{ik}Y_i(a,k), and r_{ikℓ}=min{r_{ik},r_{iℓ}}; the proposal must either give a lifted linear formulation or stop calling h_cell a polytope support program.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 3
soundness_flags.one_line: The demanded-cover certificate assumes binary exposure means 'exposed iff at least one neighbor is treated', but §7 only assumes an arbitrary K=2 measurable exposure map; add the threshold/OR exposure restriction and zero-exposure constraints, or restate the certificate for arbitrary binary maps.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the cellwise-relaxation paragraph with an explicit lifted formulation using auxiliary outcome-mass variables, active-mask linearization, and a precise statement of whether the objective is LP, linear-fractional, convex, or merely finite semialgebraic.
For Conjecture 3, lock a named K=2 threshold exposure class and include both demanded exposed-cell and demanded unexposed-cell constraints before invoking set-cover or b-matching certificates.
Downgrade the Wolsey comparison to 'lifted cover cuts/facet machinery' unless a separate completeness theorem is cited for the exact certificate family used in Conjecture 4.
Make Conjecture 2 the flagship headline and label Conjectures 1, 3, and 4 as supporting/incremental infrastructure relative to pid_network_exposure/v1 to avoid repo-axis overclaiming.

recommended_next_step: Patch the cellwise formulation and K=2 exposure-class assumptions, then resubmit with the Wolsey comparison narrowed.
